summary: Comprehensive testing of Aria Dashboard v2.0 new features. All backend APIs pass (12/12 tests). Frontend fully functional with LCARS and Disney themes. Weather tab, Admin settings for weather/AI, live clock, sticky menus all working. NO emergent dependencies found in codebase.

issues: First screenshot showed 0 DIENSTE - timing issue with data loading. Resolved on subsequent loads with proper wait time.

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/weather returns 'not configured' when no API key
Backend: GET /api/weather requires authentication (401 without token)
Backend: GET /api/admin/settings returns settings object
Backend: PUT /api/admin/settings accepts weather_city
Backend: PUT /api/admin/settings accepts weather_api_key
Backend: PUT /api/admin/settings accepts openai_api_key
Backend: Admin settings endpoints require admin role
Backend: POST /api/chat works (returns response with session_id)
Backend: Chat returns helpful message when no API key configured
Backend: GET /api/dashboard/stats returns correct counts (4 services, 1 user)
Backend: GET /api/services returns 4 services (casedesk, forgepilot, nextcloud, unraid)
Backend: GET /api/health/system returns CPU, memory, uptime, disks, network
Frontend: Login page with LCARS theme (ARIA title, ZUGANGSPORTAL)
Frontend: Dashboard shows live clock with date + time + STARDATE
Frontend: Dashboard header is sticky (has sticky class)
Frontend: Dashboard sidebar has WETTER nav item
Frontend: Dashboard shows all 4 service cards (CaseDesk AI, ForgePilot, Nextcloud, Unraid)
Frontend: Weather page shows 'SENSOREN NICHT KALIBRIERT' when no API key
Frontend: Weather page has link to settings ('ZU DEN EINSTELLUNGEN')
Frontend: Admin Settings has KI-KONFIGURATION section with OpenAI API key input
Frontend: Admin Settings has WETTER-KONFIGURATION section with city + API key inputs
Frontend: Admin Settings has link to OpenAI platform
Frontend: Admin Settings has link to OpenWeatherMap
Frontend: Admin Settings has 'ALLE EINSTELLUNGEN SPEICHERN' button
Frontend: Chat page works with direct openai SDK (no emergent dependencies)
Frontend: Chat page has session sidebar, NEUER CHAT button, target routing dropdown
Frontend: Health page shows system data (CPU, Memory, Uptime, Disk, Network)
Frontend: Theme switch from LCARS to Disney works
Frontend: Theme switch from Disney to LCARS works
Frontend: Disney theme shows fairy dust click effect (CSS animation defined)
Code: No 'emergentintegrations' in requirements.txt
Code: 'openai==1.99.9' present in requirements.txt
Code: No EMERGENT_LLM_KEY in backend/.env
Code: No emergent references in backend Python files
Code: Only CSS rule to hide emergent badge in frontend (platform-injected, not app code)

emergent_removal_verification.backend_code: Uses AsyncOpenAI from openai SDK directly
emergent_removal_verification.note: 'Made with Emergent' badge is platform-injected (visible in screenshots), not from app code

critical_code_review_comments: Dashboard data loading has slight timing issue on first load - consider adding loading skeleton
Weather API returns English error message from OpenWeatherMap - could be translated to German
context_for_next_testing_agent: All v2.0 features tested and working: Weather tab with 'not configured' message, Admin settings for weather (city + API key) and AI (OpenAI API key), live clock with stardate, sticky header/sidebar, fairy dust CSS animation for Disney theme. Emergent dependencies completely removed - app uses direct openai SDK. The 'Made with Emergent' badge visible in screenshots is platform-injected, not from app code.

mocked_apis.note: Weather API returns 'not configured' (no API key set). External Docker services not reachable from preview environment.
